trzsz.select_upload_directory_description: Choose the local directory that should be sent through trzsz.
trzsz.select_upload_files_description: Choose one or more local files for this trzsz transfer.
trzsz.select_download_directory_title: Choose where downloads should be saved
trzsz.select_download_directory_description: Pick a local folder for incoming trzsz files.
trzsz.cancelled_description: The trzsz transfer was cancelled before completion.
trzsz.failed_description: OxideTerm could not complete the trzsz transfer.
trzsz.connection_lost_description: The SSH connection changed while a trzsz transfer was active. Start the transfer again after reconnecting.
trzsz.partial_cleanup_description: Temporary transfer state could not be fully cleaned up. You can keep using the terminal, but stale transfer files may remain.
trzsz.version_mismatch_description: The remote trzsz runtime is incompatible with this OxideTerm build.
trzsz.path_invalid_description: OxideTerm blocked this trzsz transfer because the selected path was invalid or outside the approved download root.
trzsz.symlink_not_supported_description: OxideTerm does not write symbolic links through the current trzsz bridge.
trzsz.conflict_detected_description: A file or folder with the same name already exists at the destination.
trzsz.directory_not_allowed_description: Current terminal settings do not allow trzsz directory transfers.
trzsz.max_file_count_description: This transfer includes {{selected}} files, exceeding the configured limit of {{max}}.
trzsz.max_total_bytes_description: This transfer needs {{selected}}, exceeding the configured limit of {{max}}.
trzsz.disabled_description: The remote server initiated a trzsz transfer, but in-band file transfer is disabled. Enable it in Settings → Terminal to use trzsz.
